_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: jonbinney
data.message:
Merge pull request #3 from ros-perception/mikaelarguedas-patch-1

update to use non deprecated pluginlib macro

data.author: v4hn
data.message:
drop use of obsolete _1 symbols

The symbols have always been used through implicit includes from
ros_comm, but ROS-O considers changing these includes right now because
of excessive deprecation warnings building all of ROS.

https://github.com/ros-o/ros_comm/pull/3

data.author: mikaelarguedas
data.message: update to use non deprecated pluginlib macro
